message:
⬆️ Upgrade Vite to v8, plugin-react to v6, vitest to v4.1 (#4013)

- vite: ^7.3.1 → ^8.0.3 (Rolldown bundler replaces Rollup)
- @vitejs/plugin-react: ^5.1.4 → ^6.0.1 (Oxc replaces Babel for React Refresh)
- vitest: ^4.0.18 → ^4.1.2 (Vite 8 support)
- @vitest/ui: ^4.0.18 → ^4.1.2

Config changes:
- build.rollupOptions → build.rolldownOptions (Vite 8 API)
- Remove terser minifier (Vite 8 uses Oxc minifier by default)
- Console stripping via define replacements instead of terserOptions

Closes #3500

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
